Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction

full_text:
Hou Lan 侯覽
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hou Lan (侯覽)was born in Fandong county. One of the Ten Regular Attendants. Tried to make off with Emperor Shao. Hou Lan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Hou Lan lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
